nasb.text: In that day it will be said to Jerusalem: “Do not be afraid, O Zion; Do not let your hands fall limp.

esv.text: On that day it shall be said to Jerusalem: “Fear not, O Zion; let not your hands grow weak.

cnv.text: 到了那日， 必有人對耶路撒冷說： “錫安哪！不要懼怕； 你的手不要下垂。

ccb.text: 到那天，耶路撒冷必听到这样的话： “锡安啊，不要害怕！不要双手发软！
